en: If your company is required to comply with Iceland's company registration requirements, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
Does your company have a Company Registration ID issued by the Iceland Revenue and Customs agency?
Please explain why your company does not have a Company Registration ID.

The Official extract from the Business Register or Register of Limited Companies can be obtained directly from the Iceland Revenue and Customs agency or the Icelandic Business Register via online request or contacting the agency.
Does your company have an Official extract from the Business Register or Register of Limited Companies?
Please explain why your company does not have an Official extract from the Business Register or Register of Limited Companies.
